name: Small Shanghai-Style Sweet & Sour Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork spareribs across the bone into 1-1/2 inch lengths.
2. Rinse and dry the ribs, then cut them apart.
3. Heat about 3 cups of oil in a wok until very hot.
4. Add the ribs in small batches and fry until brown and crispy, about 5 minutes. Remove and drain on paper towels.
5. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, vinegar, salt, and dark soy sauce to create the sweet and sour mixture.
6. Return the hot oil to the wok. Carefully add the vinegar mixture over high heat.
7. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is syrupy.
8. Add the fried ribs to the mixture and toss until well coated.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature.
